name: @chbrain/khai-engine-power
description: khai engine content, the power domain: the base from which a persona can move others
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: the base from which a persona can move others

card.wire: Link the scene's dependency relationships and resource asymmetries to the anchor.
card.issue: Which power base does this persona hold, and what makes it credible in this scene?
card.require: Each persona links a power expression under Projection.
card.enforce: Do not merge power with status; a powerful persona may be low in rank, and a high-status persona may be powerless.
card.setup: Identify what each persona controls that others need before drafting the scene's power map.
